name: Unpackerr
short_desc: Automatically extracts downloaded archives for Sonarr, Radarr and friends.
author: Unpackerr (golift)
description: Unpackerr is a daemon that watches your media folder and automatically extracts completed archives (rar/zip/etc), then cleans them up after your *arr apps import the media. It integrates with Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Readarr and Whisparr. It shares the same /media mount as the official Runtipi *arr apps, so download paths line up automatically. This package enables Unpackerr's built-in web server on port 5656, which serves a status page and Prometheus metrics.

form_fields.label: Sonarr URL
form_fields.hint: Optional. Reach the Sonarr container by its app id on the Tipi network, e.g. http://sonarr:8989. Leave blank if you don't use Sonarr.

form_fields.label: Radarr URL
form_fields.hint: Optional. Reach the Radarr container by its app id on the Tipi network, e.g. http://radarr:7878. Leave blank if you don't use Radarr.
